textByHash.34a721f9729a1fa30485a8943afa6c68f39ff8e1: Hehe! So you speak a little skavid, eh? I'll give you a prize for that!
textByHash.3864f2027ea21774160deb62403bd572a1108b78: You be on your way, then.
textByHash.509d689792193ac98413f0f614a9b211fc273873: You stored it somewhere maybe. Go away!
textByHash.52eb45069238a3c32033b0bac65a5e9fe43c65c1: The others are with the shamans in the enclave - you'll never get them back. They hid one in the sacred rock! Nothing can touch it now.
